columns.name: was_blocked
columns.comment: 1 = action was blocked by guardrail (tried to remove critical lesson)

columns.name: blocked_reason
columns.comment: System message if action was blocked

columns.name: pass1_tags
columns.comment: JSON: First pass Claude Opus output

columns.name: pass2_tags
columns.comment: JSON: Second pass Claude Opus output (different prompt)

columns.name: pass_agreement
columns.comment: Agreement score 0-100 between pass1 and pass2

columns.name: motivation_cluster
columns.comment: JSON: motivation drivers derived from Q&A

columns.name: gaps
columns.comment: JSON: growth areas with scores and motivation alignment

columns.name: feedback_flags
columns.comment: Count of "doesnt sound like me" flags

columns.name: configured_by
columns.comment: FK → nx_users.id or admin who set this

columns.name: roadmap_id
columns.comment: FK → tory_roadmaps.id (current roadmap at snapshot time)

columns.name: engagement_score
columns.comment: Engagement score 0-100 (derived from backpack frequency, ratings, task completion)

columns.name: days_active
columns.comment: Days with at least one interaction in this period

columns.name: path_changes
columns.comment: Number of roadmap adaptations to date

columns.name: coach_overrides
columns.comment: Number of coach interventions to date

columns.name: divergence_score
columns.comment: How much coach overrides diverge from Tory recs 0-100

columns.name: tory_accuracy
columns.comment: How well Tory predictions matched outcomes 0-100

columns.name: profile_confidence
columns.comment: Current profile confidence at snapshot time 0-100

columns.name: status
columns.comment: pending | sent | in_progress | completed | expired | failed

columns.name: assessment_data
columns.comment: JSON: questions + answers (for mini) or full EPP scores (for full_epp)

columns.name: previous_scores
columns.comment: JSON: EPP/profile snapshot before this reassessment

columns.name: new_scores
columns.comment: JSON: EPP/profile snapshot after this reassessment

columns.name: drift_detected
columns.comment: 1 = significant profile drift triggered path adaptation

columns.name: criteria_order_id
columns.comment: Criteria Corp order ID (for full_epp type)

columns.name: pedagogy_mode
columns.comment: gap_fill | strength_lead | balanced (snapshot from client config)

columns.name: generation_rationale
columns.comment: Claude-generated explanation of overall path strategy (user-facing)

columns.name: match_rationale
columns.comment: Claude-generated explanation: why this lesson for this learner (user-facing)

columns.name: trait_targets
columns.comment: JSON: EPP traits this lesson targets [{trait, expected_impact}]

columns.name: original_sequence
columns.comment: Original position before coach reorder (for divergence tracking)
